prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Hyundai Beta II 2.7L V6 (G6BA)** with forged internals (Manley H-beam connecting rods, JE forged pistons, ACL race bearings) and a **Garrett GT3076R turbocharger** (0.63 A/R turbine housing) running 18 psi on a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** with custom ethanol-compatible fuel maps (ID1000 injectors, Walbro 450 LPH pump).

Full **Tomei 4-2-1 exhaust manifold** with a **custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo-back exhaust** (MagnaFlow 14850 muffler) and **GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller** for precise turbo spool management.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (custom valving for the Tiburon’s 5x114.3 bolt pattern), **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear)**, and **SuperPro poly bushings** (front control arms, subframe, and differential mounts) for reduced deflection under hard cornering.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated canards, and a carbon fiber duckbill spoiler) paired with **Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +22 wheels** (225/40/18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires) for aggressive stance and grip.

**Seibon carbon fiber hood** (with integrated NACA ducts for engine bay cooling) and **VIS Racing carbon fiber side skirts** to reduce weight and improve aerodynamics. Full **3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap** with **custom rally-style livery** (inspired by Hyundai’s WRC heritage).

**NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel** (deep-dish suede, 350mm diameter) with a **custom bolt-in roll cage** (Chassisworks 8-point chromoly, powder-coated Hyundai Racing Blue) and **Sparco Pro ADV seats** (fixed-back, FIA-approved, with custom Tiburon-specific mounting brackets).
